query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total
FROM leads l
INNER JOIN users u ON l.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%' 
  AND l.origem = 'facebook' 
  AND l.status = 'aguardando_atendimento';
